name: cf-pages-resume-template
description: 一个基于 Markdown 的开源静态简历模板，可部署到 Cloudflare Pages
author: wenyuan

scripts.dev: npm run build && npx http-server dist -p 8080 -c-1
scripts.preview: npm run build && npx http-server dist -p 8080 -c-1
scripts.deploy: npm run build && wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name cf-pages-resume-template
scripts.deploy:prod: npm run build && wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name cf-pages-resume-template --branch main
